sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40328" key="e)piniptri\s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπινιπτρὶς</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κύλιξ</foreign> cup handed round at table <sense id="n40328.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">after washing hands</tr_>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grace</tr_>-cup, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
